marketStatistics.growthDriver: Increased internet penetration in Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities combined with NEP 2020 curriculum directives.

digitalLiteracyGap.studentKeyboardProficiency: Less than 15% of middle school students in India can touch-type over 25 WPM. Most rely on touch screen phone keyboards.
digitalLiteracyGap.fileManagementSkillDeficiency: Over 80% of students entering high school do not understand directory structures, file formatting, or local vs cloud backups.
digitalLiteracyGap.cyberSafetyExposure: 70% of school kids have encountered spam or phishing attempts while playing online games, but only 20% are trained in active digital safety protocols.

nep2020Mandates.skillSubjectsIntroduced: Coding, AI prompting, and spreadsheet basics recognized as official skill electives under CBSE.
